effectData: Look at the top two cards of your deck. Reveal up to one [CCG] affinity or <Amon's Pushups> card and add it to your hand. Place the remaining cards on the bottom of your deck in any order. If you added a card to your hand, place one card from your hand into your sideline.
triggerData: Choose one character with 2500 or less BP on your opponent's front line and sideline it.
